response.justification: Candidate is vastly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience and current Staff Engineer title. Strong technical match on TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM/AI infrastructure exceeds requirements. However, seniority mismatch creates significant risk of salary expectations misalignment, role dissatisfaction, and short tenure. Berlin location aligns with on-site requirement. Worth a screening conversation only if open to a senior IC role or if candidate has explicitly expressed interest in stepping down.
strengths: Deep TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS experience exceeds all required skills
Located in Berlin matching on-site requirement; basic German
AI/LLM infrastructure experience aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Massive seniority overshoot — Staff Engineer applying for entry-level role
High flight risk due to likely salary and growth expectations mismatch
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly listed; MongoDB-heavy database background
